name: _audit_log_
description: Audit trail of security-relevant actions: who did what, to what, when, from where, and with what outcome.

019f65b3-d3e4-7c7c-b357-eecfdf5cef15.name: event_id
019f65b3-d3e4-7c7c-b357-eecfdf5cef15.description: Unique identifier for this audit record itself (UUIDv7).

019f65b3-d3e4-73bd-9199-06ce692d9093.name: occurred_at
019f65b3-d3e4-73bd-9199-06ce692d9093.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the audited action actually took place.

019f65b3-d3e4-7021-aa73-19c16c747eb6.name: recorded_at
019f65b3-d3e4-7021-aa73-19c16c747eb6.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when this record was written. Compare with occurred_at to detect ingestion lag or clock skew.

019f65b3-d3e4-70b1-b9a7-66665c4d3983.name: trace_id
019f65b3-d3e4-70b1-b9a7-66665c4d3983.description: Distributed trace/correlation ID linking this event to related events across services.

019f65b3-d3e4-7e39-8446-8c8b037a9a38.name: request_id
019f65b3-d3e4-7e39-8446-8c8b037a9a38.description: Identifier of the originating request, if applicable.

019f65b3-d3e4-7b19-82b7-51fefc6ee322.name: actor_id
019f65b3-d3e4-7b19-82b7-51fefc6ee322.description: Identifier of who or what performed the action. Use "system" for automated/internal actors.

019f65b3-d3e4-7a91-adde-07a5cf26c8c2.name: on_behalf_of_id
019f65b3-d3e4-7a91-adde-07a5cf26c8c2.description: Set when actor_id is acting on behalf of another identity (delegation/impersonation), e.g. an admin or service acting for a user.

019f65b3-d3e4-70f2-954e-c078a0d74b4e.name: session_id
019f65b3-d3e4-70f2-954e-c078a0d74b4e.description: Non-secret session/token identifier. Never store raw credentials, tokens, or secrets here.

019f65b3-d3e4-7dc8-bcf4-6f3e2cfa624b.name: operation
019f65b3-d3e4-7dc8-bcf4-6f3e2cfa624b.description: Coarse-grained action category, for consistent filtering across all producers.

019f65b3-d3e4-7c89-9c6a-2df577c21fbf.name: resource_type
019f65b3-d3e4-7c89-9c6a-2df577c21fbf.description: The kind of resource acted upon, e.g. "invoice", "user_account", "api_key".

019f65b3-d3e4-7171-aa1c-2e37e433345b.name: resource_id
019f65b3-d3e4-7171-aa1c-2e37e433345b.description: Identifier of the specific resource instance acted upon.

019f65b3-d3e4-7545-b93f-dfce85a54bbe.name: event_name
019f65b3-d3e4-7545-b93f-dfce85a54bbe.description: Fine-grained, human-readable event taxonomy, e.g. "user.login.failed" or "invoice.updated". Complements operation/resource_type with producer-specific detail.

019f65b3-d3e4-7c4f-9751-3bc4dd183df5.name: error_code
019f65b3-d3e4-7c4f-9751-3bc4dd183df5.description: Machine-readable error/denial code, present when status is failure, denied, or error.

019f65b3-d3e4-7d9d-a2f3-da8ac99d8d14.name: error_message
019f65b3-d3e4-7d9d-a2f3-da8ac99d8d14.description: Human-readable error detail. Avoid embedding secrets or PII beyond what's already logged elsewhere.

019f65b3-d3e4-757d-8cd3-5207c6d7d958.name: latency_ms
019f65b3-d3e4-757d-8cd3-5207c6d7d958.description: Duration of the underlying operation, in milliseconds.

019f65b3-d3e4-790a-96c2-69f2d5931eea.name: source_ip
019f65b3-d3e4-790a-96c2-69f2d5931eea.description: Originating IP address of the actor.

019f65b3-d3e4-77f7-b01f-4853f19f2651.name: service_name
019f65b3-d3e4-77f7-b01f-4853f19f2651.description: The service/component that emitted this audit record.

019f65b3-d3e4-70d4-9dcb-b08d10798318.name: region
019f65b3-d3e4-70d4-9dcb-b08d10798318.description: Deployment region or data center of the emitting service.

019f65b3-d3e4-74d1-9c20-a6d199cf1b70.name: metadata
019f65b3-d3e4-74d1-9c20-a6d199cf1b70.description: Additional producer-specific context that doesn't warrant a first-class field.

019f65b3-d3e4-7bd3-b702-5dcb79b1e58a.name: integrity_hash
019f65b3-d3e4-7bd3-b702-5dcb79b1e58a.description: Hash of this record chained with the previous record's hash, for tamper-evidence. Populated by the log writer, never by the emitting service.
